Online Services Forms and Publications Income Tax Return, Schedules and Guide

Income Tax Return, Schedules and Guide
TP-1-V

The documents listed on this page contain instructions for filing your income tax return for the 2025 taxation year. Note filesignature Note about electronic signatures. This form can be signed electronically . End of note isa Our downloadable documents may not comply with Web accessibility standards. If you are having problems using them, please contact us . Income Tax Return (449 KB) Guide to the Income Tax Return TP-1.G-V  (1,900 KB) Work Charts (187 KB) Schedule A – Amount for Dependants and Amount Transferred by a Child Pursuing Studies  (193 KB) Schedule B – Tax Relief Measures  (168 KB) Schedule C – Tax Credit for Childcare Expenses  (202 KB) Schedule D – Solidarity Tax Credit  (185 KB) [ Schedule D video ] Schedule E – Tax Adjustments and Credits  (151 KB) Schedule F – Contribution to the Health Services Fund  (158 KB) Schedule G – Capital Gains and Losses (288 KB) Schedule H – Tax Credit for Caregivers  (322 KB) Schedule J – Tax Credit for Home-Support Services for Seniors  (203 KB) Schedule K – Premium Payable Under the Québec Prescription Drug Insurance Plan  (231 KB) Schedule L – Business Income  (118 KB) Schedule M – Interest Paid on a Student Loan  (117 KB) Schedule N – Adjustment of Investment Expenses  (132 KB) Schedule P – Tax Credits Respecting the Work Premium  (280 KB) Schedule Q – Retirement Income Transferred to Your Spouse  (138 KB) Schedule R – Québec Parental Insurance Plan (QPIP) Premium (149 KB) Schedule S – Amount Transferred by a Child 18 or Over Enrolled in Post-Secondary Studies  (151 KB) Schedule T – Tax Credit for Tuition or Examination Fees (Claiming or Transferring the Credit)  (167 KB) Schedule U – Québec Pension Plan (QPP) Contribution and Deduction (383 KB) Schedule V – Tax Credits for Donations and Gifts  (278 KB)
